chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1511 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.5908/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 29-09-2025 Syed Naimat Ali Shah, Advocate for the Petitioner Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh >>>>>><<<<<<< In compliance of order dated 18-09-2025, learned AAG files statement along with certain documents, whereas, Counsel for the Petitioner by filing statement also places on record certain documents, same are taken on record, copies exchanged to each other. Counsel for the Petitioner submits that grievance of the Petitioner has now been redressed, therefore, under instructions, does not press the instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is disposed of as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
